prestazioni: Engine: Replace the original 2.9L Lagonda LB6 inline-6 with a fully rebuilt and bored-out 3.2L LB6T (T = Twin-Spark) featuring a bespoke dry-sump lubrication system by Cosworth, forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft by Bryant Racing. Pair with a custom camshaft profile by Kent Cams (280° duration, 0.480" lift) and a ported/polished cylinder head with oversized valves (intake: 48mm, exhaust: 42mm) by JE Motorsport.

Forced Induction: Install a custom-built, period-correct supercharger system using a Roots-type blower (GMC 6-71, polished and port-matched by Dyer’s Machine Service) with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold by Kinsler Fuel Injection. Boost pressure set to 12 psi, controlled via a custom wastegate by Turbosmart. Fuel system upgraded with dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, 1,000cc/min injectors by Injector Dynamics, and a custom fuel rail by Radium Engineering.

Drivetrain & Suspension: Replace the original 4-speed manual with a close-ratio 5-speed dog-engagement gearbox by Hewland (LD200, magnesium case) paired with a limited-slip differential by Quaife (ATB helical). Suspension overhaul includes custom-fabricated double-wishbone front and De Dion rear setups with Öhlins TTX40 coilovers (2-way adjustable, 400 lbs/in springs front, 350 lbs/in rear) and spherical bearings by Aurora Bearing. Braking system upgraded to AP Racing CP6640 calipers (4-piston front, 2-piston rear) with 330mm vented rotors by Brembo and Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Bodywork: Replace the original aluminum panels with a lightweight carbon-fiber replica body by RS Panels (UK), featuring a custom widebody kit inspired by the 1956 Le Mans-winning DB3S (flared fenders, aggressive front splitter, and a rear diffuser by KW Automotive). Paint scheme: Aston Martin Racing Green (BS381C-227) with gold leaf pinstriping by Signwriting Services Ltd. and a matte black hood stripe.

Aerodynamics: Install a custom front splitter by APR Performance (carbon fiber, 3-piece adjustable) and a rear wing by Voltex (Type 3, 1,800mm width, 300mm chord, 3D-printed titanium endplates). Underbody features a full-length flat floor with integrated vortex generators by Aeromotions and a rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (carbon fiber, 3-stage design).

Interior: Replace the original leather seats with ultra-lightweight carbon-fiber racing seats by Sparco (Pro ADV, FIA 8862-2009 certified) upholstered in Alcantara (Aston Martin Racing Green with gold stitching). Install a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (8-point, T45 steel, MSA/FIA approved) with integrated fire suppression system by Lifeline (Zero 360, plumbed to all critical areas). Steering wheel replaced with a quick-release unit by OMP (330mm diameter, suede grip) and a digital dash by AIM MXS Strada (1.3" display, configurable shift lights).
